# EdgeBaseCore

Use this file as a quick-reference contract for AI coding assistants working with the
Swift shared core package.

## Package Boundary

Use `EdgeBaseCore` only as a shared dependency for the higher-level Swift package.

This package does not provide the `EdgeBaseClient` or `EdgeBaseServerClient`
entrypoints.

## Source Of Truth

- Package README: https://github.com/edge-base/edgebase/blob/main/packages/sdk/swift/packages/core/README.md
- Root README: https://github.com/edge-base/edgebase/blob/main/packages/sdk/swift/README.md
- SDK Overview: https://edgebase.fun/docs/sdks

## Public Package

- `EdgeBaseCore`

## Canonical Examples

### Import the package

```swift
import EdgeBaseCore
```

### Error handling

```swift
do {
    // shared core call
} catch let error as EdgeBaseError {
    print(error.statusCode)
}
```

## Hard Rules

- do not use this package as the app-facing entrypoint
- keep Service Key workflows in the higher-level package
- prefer the higher-level package for auth, push, analytics, and room features

## Quick Reference

```text
HttpClient      -> shared HTTP client
TableRef        -> query builder
DbRef           -> namespace reference
StorageClient   -> storage wrapper
EdgeBaseError   -> error type
FieldOps        -> atomic field helpers
```
